event: China dog figurine in a window overlooking St Ives harbor
description: A white and red-brown porcelain dog figurine sits on an orange-red upholstered chair near a window. Through the window, a harbor scene is visible with a dark steamship on gray-green water, a lighthouse on a rocky point, and hills under a cloudy sky. A brown curtain is pulled to one side at upper right. The composition juxtaposes the domestic interior with the maritime view beyond.

_meta.title: China dog in a St. Ives window
